wn.def: an unhappy and worried mental state
the act of disturbing the mind or body
a physical condition in which there is a disturbance of normal functioning

existing.en: unhappy or worried because something bad happened

ex.en: She was upset about losing her job.

existing.en: make someone feel unhappy or worried

ex.en: I didn't mean to upset you.

existing.en: knock something over so it turns upside down

ex.en: The cat upset the vase of flowers.

wn.def: spend or take a vacation

existing.en: a period of time when you don't have to work or study

ex.en: We're going to the beach for vacation.

wn.def: make a veinlike pattern

existing.en: one of the tubes that carry blood from the body back to the heart

ex.en: The nurse found a vein to draw blood.

wn.def: rendered competent through trial and experience

existing.en: a person who has served in the armed forces, especially during a war

ex.en: The parade honored local war veterans.
ex.ko: 그 퍼레이드는 지역 참전 용사들을 기렸다.

existing.cue: 한 분야에서 오래 경험을 쌓은 사람
existing.en: a person with a lot of experience in a particular activity or field

ex.en: She is a veteran of the fashion industry.

wn.def: close enough to be walked to

existing.en: the activity of going somewhere on foot

ex.en: Walking is good for your health.

wn.def: to a great degree or by a great distance

existing.en: a route or direction to get somewhere

ex.en: Can you show me the way to the station?
ex.ko: 역으로 가는 길을 알려줄 수 있어요?

existing.en: a manner or method of doing something

ex.en: This is the best way to learn English.
ex.ko: 이것이 영어를 배우는 가장 좋은 방법이다.

wn.def: towards the side exposed to wind

existing.en: the condition of the sky and air at a certain time and place

ex.en: The weather is nice today.

wn.def: weight down with a load
present with a bias

existing.en: how heavy a person or thing is

ex.en: He has lost a lot of weight recently.

existing.en: a heavy object lifted as exercise

ex.en: He lifts weights at the gym three times a week.
ex.ko: 그는 헬스장에서 일주일에 세 번 웨이트를 든다.

existing.en: the importance given to something

ex.en: Her opinion carries a lot of weight in this company.
ex.ko: 그녀의 의견은 이 회사에서 큰 비중을 차지한다.

wn.def: come up, as of a liquid
a deep hole or shaft dug or drilled to obtain water or oil or gas or brine
a cavity or vessel used to contain liquid
an abundant source
an open shaft through the floors of a building (as for a stairway)
an enclosed compartment in a ship or plane for holding something as e.g. fish or a plane's landing gear or for protecting something as e.g. a ship's pumps

existing.en: in a good or satisfactory way

ex.en: She sings very well.

existing.en: in good health

ex.en: I don't feel well today.

wn.def: wetness caused by water

existing.en: covered or soaked with water or another liquid

ex.en: My shoes are still wet from the rain.
ex.ko: 내 신발은 비 때문에 아직 젖어 있다.

existing.en: make something wet

ex.en: Wet the cloth before you clean the window.

wn.def: change directions as if revolving on a pivot
wheel somebody or something
move along on or as if on wheels or a wheeled vehicle
ride a bicycle

existing.en: a round object that turns to allow a vehicle to move

ex.en: The car has four wheels.
ex.ko: 그 차는 바퀴가 네 개 있다.

existing.en: the round device a driver holds to steer a vehicle

ex.en: He gripped the wheel tightly.

wn.def: to a complete degree or to the full or entire extent (`whole' is often used informally for `wholly')

existing.en: complete, with no part left out

ex.en: She ate the whole cake by herself.
ex.ko: 그녀는 케이크를 통째로 혼자 다 먹었다.

existing.en: all of something; the entire amount

ex.en: The whole of the city was affected by the storm.

wn.def: in an uncontrolled and rampant manner
in a wild or undomesticated manner

existing.en: living or growing in natural conditions, not controlled by people

ex.en: Wild flowers grew along the path.

existing.en: uncontrolled, or full of excitement

ex.en: The crowd went wild when the band appeared.

existing.en: a natural area or condition not affected by people

ex.en: These animals live in the wild.

wn.def: decree or ordain
determine by choice
leave or give by will after one's death

existing.en: the mental power to decide and control your actions

ex.en: She has a strong will to succeed.

existing.en: used before a verb to talk about the future

ex.en: It will rain tomorrow.

existing.en: a legal document that says what happens to someone's property after they die

ex.en: He left everything to his children in his will.
ex.ko: 그는 유언장에서 모든 것을 자녀들에게 남겼다.

wn.def: the act of making a choice

existing.en: ready and happy to do something

ex.en: She is willing to help whenever needed.
ex.ko: 그녀는 필요할 때면 언제든 기꺼이 도와준다.

wn.def: travel through the air

existing.en: one of the parts of a bird, insect, or plane that is used for flying

ex.en: The eagle spread its wings.

existing.en: a part of a building that sticks out from the main part

ex.en: The hospital built a new wing for children.
ex.ko: 병원은 어린이를 위한 새 별관을 지었다.

existing.en: a group within an organization that has particular views

ex.en: He belongs to the liberal wing of the party.

wn.def: spend the winter

existing.cue: 일 년 중 가장 추운 계절
existing.en: the coldest season of the year

ex.en: It often snows in winter.

wn.def: a way of doing or being
United States Jewish leader (born in Hungary) (1874-1949)
United States religious leader (born in Bohemia) who united reform Jewish organizations in the United States (1819-1900)

existing.en: showing good judgment based on knowledge and experience

ex.en: It was wise of you to save some money.
ex.ko: 돈을 좀 저축해둔 건 현명한 일이었다.

wn.def: put into words or an expression

existing.en: a single unit of language that has meaning

ex.en: Do you know the meaning of this word?

existing.en: news or information about something

ex.en: We haven't had any word from him yet.
ex.ko: 우리는 아직 그에게서 아무 소식도 못 들었다.

wn.def: involving the entire earth

existing.cue: 지구 전체와 그 안의 모든 사람
existing.en: the earth and all the people and places on it

ex.en: She wants to travel around the world.
ex.ko: 그녀는 세계 곳곳을 여행하고 싶어 한다.

wn.def: treat unjustly
that which is contrary to the principles of justice or law
any harm or injury resulting from a violation of a legal right

existing.en: not correct or true

ex.en: That's the wrong answer.

existing.en: in an incorrect way

ex.en: You spelled my name wrong.
ex.ko: 너 내 이름 철자를 잘못 썼어.

existing.en: morally bad or unfair

ex.en: It's wrong to lie to your friends.

wn.def: turn yellow

existing.en: having the color of a lemon or banana

ex.en: She wore a yellow shirt.

existing.en: the color of a lemon or banana

ex.en: Yellow is a bright, cheerful color.

wn.def: an affirmative

existing.en: used to give a positive answer or show agreement

ex.en: Yes, I agree with you.

wn.def: the day immediately before today
the recent past

existing.en: on the day before today

ex.en: I met her yesterday.

wn.def: any immature animal
United States film and television actress (1913-2000)
United States civil rights leader (1921-1971)
British physicist and Egyptologist
United States jazz tenor saxophonist (1909-1959)
English poet (1683-1765)
United States baseball player and famous pitcher (1867-1955)
United States religious leader of the Mormon Church after the assassination of Joseph Smith
young people collectively

existing.en: not old; in an early stage of life

ex.en: They have three young children.

wn.def: with little or no preparation or forethought
said or done without having been planned or written in advance

existing.en: say or do something without preparing it in advance

ex.en: The actor ad-libbed a joke when he forgot his line.
ex.ko: 그 배우는 대사를 잊어버리자 즉흥적으로 농담을 했다.

existing.en: something said or done spontaneously without being planned

ex.en: Her ad-libs got more laughs than the script.
ex.ko: 그녀의 애드리브가 대본보다 더 많은 웃음을 자아냈다.

wn.def: an experience that appalls

existing.en: shocking and extremely unpleasant

ex.en: The living conditions in the camp were appalling.

wn.def: stick out or up
cause to bulge or swell outwards

existing.en: the majority or largest part of something

ex.en: The bulk of the work is already done.

existing.en: the large size or mass of something

ex.en: The furniture's bulk made it hard to move.
ex.ko: 그 가구는 부피가 커서 옮기기 힘들었다.

wn.def: an edge tool with a flat steel blade with a cutting edge

existing.en: carve or shape wood or stone using a chisel

ex.en: The sculptor chiseled the marble into a statue.
ex.ko: 그 조각가는 대리석을 끌로 깎아 조각상을 만들었다.

existing.en: cheat someone out of money or property (informal)

ex.en: He was accused of chiseling investors out of their savings.
ex.ko: 그는 투자자들의 저축금을 사취했다는 혐의를 받았다.

wn.def: surrendered as a penalty

existing.en: lose or give up a right, privilege, or possession as a penalty

ex.en: Passengers who miss check-in forfeit their tickets.
ex.ko: 체크인 시간을 놓친 승객은 항공권을 몰수당한다.

existing.en: something that is lost or given up as a penalty for breaking a rule or agreement

ex.en: The contract includes a forfeit for late delivery.
ex.ko: 그 계약에는 배송 지연 시 위약금 조항이 포함되어 있다.

wn.def: gay or light-hearted recreational activity for diversion or amusement

existing.en: to play and jump around happily

ex.en: The puppies frolicked in the yard.

wn.def: the result of a mathematical integration

existing.en: necessary and essential to make something complete

ex.en: Trust is integral to any good relationship.

wn.def: a celebrity who is an inspiration to others

existing.en: important or interesting enough to deserve attention

ex.en: There has been a notable increase in remote work since the pandemic.
ex.ko: 팬데믹 이후 재택근무가 눈에 띄게 증가했다.

existing.en: well known and respected

ex.en: Several notable scientists attended the conference.
ex.ko: 여러 저명한 과학자들이 그 학회에 참석했다.

wn.def: suggest sex to

existing.en: a suggestion or plan put forward for consideration

ex.en: The company received an interesting business proposition.
ex.ko: 그 회사는 흥미로운 사업 제안을 받았다.

existing.en: a statement that can be judged true or false

ex.en: The mathematician proved the proposition using a simple proof.
ex.ko: 그 수학자는 간단한 증명으로 그 명제를 증명했다.

wn.def: put into a recess
make a recess in
close at the end of a session

existing.en: a break from lessons or work

ex.en: The kids played outside during recess.

existing.en: a temporary pause in the activities of a court, parliament, or other formal body

ex.en: The court was in recess until the following Monday.

existing.en: a small area in a wall that is set back from the main surface

ex.en: A small statue stood in a recess in the wall.
ex.ko: 벽의 움푹 들어간 공간에 작은 조각상이 놓여 있었다.

wn.def: a publication (such as a book) that is reprinted without changes or editing and offered again for sale

existing.en: publish or release something again, often with small changes

ex.en: The publisher decided to reissue the novel with a new cover.
ex.ko: 그 출판사는 새 표지로 그 소설을 재발행하기로 했다.

wn.def: an easy victory
a girl who behaves in a boyish manner
gay or light-hearted recreational activity for diversion or amusement

existing.en: play in a lively, energetic way

ex.en: The puppies romped around the yard all afternoon.

existing.en: win a game or competition easily

ex.en: The home team romped to victory, 5-0.

wn.def: project on a background, such as a screen, like a silhouette
represent by a silhouette

existing.cue: 빛을 등지고 서 있을 때 보이는 검은 윤곽
existing.en: the dark outline of a person or object seen against a lighter background

ex.en: We could see the silhouette of the mountains against the sunset.
ex.ko: 우리는 노을을 배경으로 산의 실루엣을 볼 수 있었다.

wn.def: treat with sulphur in order to preserve

existing.en: a yellow chemical element with a strong smell, found near volcanoes

ex.en: The hot spring smelled strongly of sulphur.
ex.ko: 그 온천에서는 유황 냄새가 강하게 났다.

wn.def: having or revealing supreme mastery or skill

existing.en: a person with exceptional skill, especially in music

ex.en: She is a violin virtuoso who has performed all over the world.
ex.ko: 그녀는 전 세계에서 공연해온 바이올린 거장이다.

wn.def: breathing with a husky or whistling sound
(Briticism) a clever or amusing scheme or trick

existing.cue: 숨을 쉴 때 쌕쌕 소리가 나며
existing.en: breathe with difficulty, making a whistling sound

ex.en: The old man wheezed as he climbed the stairs.

wn.def: sound of something in rapid motion

existing.en: make a soft, continuous sound like something spinning fast

ex.en: The fan whirred quietly in the corner of the room.

wn.def: dried seaweed especially that cast ashore
the destruction or collapse of something
growth of marine vegetation especially of the large forms such as rockweeds and kelp

existing.en: cause someone to suffer greatly, especially from pain or guilt

ex.en: He was wracked with guilt after the accident.
ex.ko: 그는 사고 이후 죄책감에 몹시 시달렸다.
